# Fusaka (`fulu`)

<!-- This file is generated by generate-experimental.sh. Do not edit manually. -->

**Fusaka** is an upcoming Ethereum network upgrade; `fulu` is its consensus-layer fork. Xatu collects data from Fusaka devnets using its [`release/fulu`](https://github.com/ethpandaops/xatu/tree/release/fulu) branch.

## Active devnets

| Network | Fork-specific tables | Explorer | Source |
|---------|----------------------|----------|--------|
| `blob-devnet-0` | 0 | [Dora](https://dora.blob-devnet-0.ethpandaops.io) | [ethpandaops/blob-devnets](https://github.com/ethpandaops/blob-devnets) |

## Querying

Devnet data lives on the same ClickHouse endpoint as production networks: `https://clickhouse.xatu.ethpandaops.io`. Each devnet has its **own database**, named after the network — no `meta_network_name` filter needed:

```sql
SELECT * FROM `blob-devnet-0`.beacon_api_eth_v1_events_block LIMIT 3
```

> Devnets are ephemeral. Databases disappear when a devnet is deprovisioned, and schemas drift between devnets — always check what a devnet actually has before relying on it.

## Tables in the main catalog

These tables were introduced for Fusaka and have since merged to xatu master — they are part of the main catalog and available on production networks:

- [`beacon_api_eth_v1_events_data_column_sidecar`](/data/xatu/schema/beacon_api_/#beacon_api_eth_v1_events_data_column_sidecar)
- [`libp2p_gossipsub_data_column_sidecar`](/data/xatu/schema/libp2p_/#libp2p_gossipsub_data_column_sidecar)
- [`libp2p_rpc_data_column_custody_probe`](/data/xatu/schema/libp2p_/#libp2p_rpc_data_column_custody_probe)

## Devnet-only tables

None — these devnets run the standard xatu schema.
